name: Xenarch
description: Xenarch is an x402 MCP server for AI agent payments — non-custodial, USDC micropayments on Base L2. Claude, Cursor and any MCP client pay for HTTP 402–gated content on-chain, agent wallet to publisher wallet direct. The agent wallet never needs ETH — USDC is the only token it ever holds. 0% Xenarch fee, no Xenarch contract in the money flow.
